name: wideplayer-for-x
description: Vite + TypeScript scaffold for the WidePlayer for X browser extension

scripts.build: npm run prepare-build && npm run build:all
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome:bundle && npm run build:firefox:bundle && npm run build:safari:bundle
scripts.build:chrome: npm run prepare-build && npm run build:chrome:bundle
scripts.build:chrome:bundle: npm run clean:chrome && vite build --mode chrome-ui && vite build --mode chrome-content && vite build --mode chrome-background
scripts.build:firefox: npm run prepare-build && npm run build:firefox:bundle
scripts.build:firefox:bundle: npm run clean:firefox && vite build --mode firefox-ui && vite build --mode firefox-content && vite build --mode firefox-background
scripts.build:safari: npm run prepare-build && npm run build:safari:bundle
scripts.build:safari:bundle: npm run clean:safari && vite build --mode safari-ui && vite build --mode safari-content && vite build --mode safari-background
scripts.clean: node --input-type=module --eval "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { force: true, recursive: true });"
scripts.clean:chrome: node --input-type=module --eval "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist/chrome', { force: true, recursive: true });"
scripts.clean:firefox: node --input-type=module --eval "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist/firefox', { force: true, recursive: true });"
scripts.clean:release: node --input-type=module --eval "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('release', { force: true, recursive: true });"
scripts.clean:safari: node --input-type=module --eval "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist/safari', { force: true, recursive: true });"
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && node scripts/package-release.mjs chrome
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/package-release.mjs firefox
scripts.package:release: npm run clean:release && npm run build && node scripts/package-release.mjs
scripts.package:safari: npm run build:safari && node scripts/package-release.mjs safari
scripts.dev:chrome: npm run prepare-build && npm run clean:chrome && npm run watch:chrome
scripts.watch:chrome: sh -c 'vite build --watch --mode chrome-ui & vite build --watch --mode chrome-content & vite build --watch --mode chrome-background & wait'
